channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 26%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Rachel Reeves tells ministers to ‘buy British’ in four key industries
item.description: Rachel Reeves tells ministers to ‘buy British’ in four key industries

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer will still face leadership contest if Burnham loses by-election, Jess Phillips says
item.description: Starmer will still face leadership contest if Burnham loses by-election, Jess Phillips says

item.title: The Guardian: Here is Andy Burnham’s route to save Labour: a new manifesto, a new election and electoral reform | Polly Toynbee - The Guardian
item.description: Here is Andy Burnham’s route to save Labour: a new manifesto, a new election and electoral reform | Polly Toynbee - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Elon Musk retweet signals rightwing split that could help Andy Burnham in Makerfield
item.description: Elon Musk retweet signals rightwing split that could help Andy Burnham in Makerfield

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour has never had a female leader as ‘it’s a bit sexist’, says Jess Phillips
item.description: Labour has never had a female leader as ‘it’s a bit sexist’, says Jess Phillips

item.title: ConservativeHome: Nigel Jones: The assassination of a British Prime Minister is mercifully a peaceful affair - bar Perceval
item.description: Nigel Jones: The assassination of a British Prime Minister is mercifully a peaceful affair - bar Perceval

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: It would be a weird combo of some of the most anti-Corbyn Labour members and the people who did not vote for Corbyn in 2015 but did in 2016, is my hunch from having covered past Labour leadership elections.
item.description: It would be a weird combo of some of the most anti-Corbyn Labour members and the people who did not vote for Corbyn in 2015 but did in 2016, is my hunch from having covered past Labour leadership elections.

item.title: BBC Politics: Former SNP chief executive Peter Murrell in custody after admitting £400,000 embezzlement
item.description: Former SNP chief executive Peter Murrell in custody after admitting £400,000 embezzlement

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer 'appalled' by case of boys spared jail after raping teenage girls
item.description: Starmer 'appalled' by case of boys spared jail after raping teenage girls

item.title: LabourList: 'Patriotism and nation-building must be at the heart of Labour's values story'
item.description: 'Patriotism and nation-building must be at the heart of Labour's values story'
